name: Orion Office REIT Inc. Common Stock
summary: Orion Office REIT Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns, manages, and leases a portfolio of single-tenant and multi-tenant office properties located primarily in suburban markets across the United States. The company focuses on acquiring and managing high-quality office assets with strong credit tenants. Orion Office REIT aims to provide stable and growing dividend income to its shareholders.
